skillPriority.info: Soldier 0 Anby's Basic Attack is recommended to upgrade for higher damage multipliers.
Soldier 0 Anby's Special Attack is her main source of damage and hence her most important skill to upgrade.
Soldier 0 Anby's Ultimate and Chain Attack are recommended to upgrade as they have high burst damage.
Soldier 0 Anby's Assist Attack is not a priority compared to his other abilities, but can be upgraded for higher damage multipliers.
Soldier 0 Anby's Dodge is used within her out-of-stun rotation requently and is recommended to upgrade for higher damage multipliers.

For Crit Burnice, most of her DMG comes from her Afterburn Procs, which makes her Core even more important
We dont use them, they do not matter.
For Crit Burnice, a large portion of her DMG comes from her EX Special during Stun Windows.
For Crit Burnice, a large portion of her DMG comes from her Ultimate during Stun Windows. Chains are always important as well.
Assists are usually fine to level a bit regardless of the character.

wengines.name: Hailstorm Shrine
wengines.note: Hailstorn Shrine becomes a worse weapon choice after Mindscape 4 due to the 30% free Crit Rate provided from her M4.

Burnices Afterburn is, aside from BURN, her main source of damage and hence recommended to be upgraded first and foremost!

Burnice's Basic Attack: Mixed Flame Blend is occassionally used in case of low energy to quickly use heat to then lead into EX Special for more heat. It's recommended to upgrade third for higher damage and daze multipliers.
Burnice's Ultimate and Special are her highest priority and are strongly recommended to level up first together as they're both used frequently to increase her Heat Gauge.
Burnice's Ultimate and Special are her highest priority and are strongly recommended to level up first together as they're both used frequently to increase her Heat Gauge.
Burnice's Assist Attacks can do a decent amount of damage, it's not a priority but can be upgraded for higher damage multipliers.
Burnice's Dodge is rarely used as an off field DPS, it's not recommended to upgrade this first.
